---
name: elegy-configuration
description: "Repo-local non-authoritative routing mirror for the dedicated Elegy configuration surface."
---

# Elegy-configuration

Use `elegy-configuration` for deterministic template/profile listing, inspection, apply, and verify flows over governed configuration artifacts.

This mirror is repo-local routing output only. Authority remains in `contracts/` and executable behavior remains in `rust/crates/elegy-configuration`.
